name: Park Side Financial
description_short: TRUE Community Credit Union is a Michigan-based, member-owned credit union serving anyone who lives, learns, works, or worships across the state. Offers savings, checking, loans, mortgages, and business financing with competitive rates.
description_long:
TRUE Community Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative operating in Michigan with a stated mission to make a lasting legacy in their community. The organization emphasizes community impact and has been recognized as Jackson Magazine's Best Credit Union as of March 2026. As a federally-insured credit union (routing number 272481583), they operate under NCUA oversight and serve a broad membership base across Michigan.

The credit union offers comprehensive financial services across savings, spending, investing, and borrowing categories. On the savings side, members can access regular shares, high-yield savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates (3.75% APY advertised), and specialized accounts including HSAs and trust accounts. For spending, they provide checking accounts (including Michigan Made Checking with rewards), debit cards, credit cards (TRUE Rewards Visa at 11.99% APR), and digital banking tools including Zelle and mobile pay. Borrowing products include auto loans (3.99% APR advertised), personal loans, student loans, home mortgages, home equity lines of credit (6.75% APR), recreational vehicle and boat loans (5.74% APR with 90-day skip-a-pay promotion), and commercial lending options for business members.

TRUE Community Credit Union distinguishes itself through community-focused programming including youth savings accounts, student-run credit union initiatives, scholarship programs, and Jackson Saves programs. They offer free financial wellness resources, educational tools, and Savvy Money—a free digital tool providing debt-to-income ratio analysis alongside credit scores. The credit union maintains multiple service channels including physical branch locations, shared branching access, Teller 24 (24-hour service), and comprehensive digital banking. They also offer business services including payroll, merchant card services, and remote deposit capture for commercial members.

As a credit union, TRUE Community operates on a not-for-profit model where members are part-owners, potentially allowing for better rates and fewer fees compared to for-profit banks. However, membership eligibility is limited to those meeting the common bond requirement (living, learning, working, or worshiping in Michigan). The advertised rates shown are promotional and actual rates will vary based on creditworthiness and loan terms. Like all credit unions, they are subject to membership field of membership restrictions, though this organization has broad geographic coverage across Michigan.
services: Money market accounts and club accounts
Checking accounts including Michigan Made Checking Rewards
Home mortgages and home equity lines of credit
Personal loans and instant cash loans
Credit cards (TRUE Rewards Visa and secured credit)
Commercial loans including equipment, lines of credit, and micro loans
Digital banking, mobile apps, and Zelle transfers
Payroll services and merchant card services for business members
pros: Competitive advertised rates: Auto loans from 3.99% APR, share certificates at 3.75% APY, recreational vehicle/boat loans at 5.74% APR with 90-day skip-a-pay
Comprehensive product suite including savings accounts, checking, credit cards, auto/home/student/business loans, and mortgages under one institution
Free Savvy Money financial wellness tool providing debt-to-income ratio analysis and credit score tracking with improvement tips
Community-focused programs including youth savings, scholarships, student-run credit union, and Jackson Saves initiatives
Broad membership eligibility across entire State of Michigan (anyone who lives, learns, works, or worships in the state)
Multiple service access channels: physical branches, shared branching network, Teller 24 (24-hour service), digital banking, and mobile apps
Recognized community reputation—voted Jackson Magazine's Best Credit Union (March 2026)
cons: Membership restricted to Michigan residents/workers/students/worshippers only; not available nationwide
Advertised promotional rates (3.99% auto, 3.75% CD, 11.99% credit card) are likely best-case scenarios; actual rates depend on creditworthiness and loan terms
Credit union field-of-membership limitations may apply despite broad geographic coverage; some products may have additional eligibility requirements
Website displays outdated content (multiple dates show 2026 future dates in the crawl: April 8, April 14, January 6), suggesting content management issues
Limited transparency on specific eligibility requirements, approval criteria, and whether all advertised rates/products are available to all members
best_for: Michigan residents seeking a full-service financial institution with competitive rates and community values
Small business owners and entrepreneurs in Michigan needing commercial loans, lines of credit, and payroll services
Families and students interested in youth savings programs, scholarships, and financial wellness education resources
Borrowers refinancing student loans or seeking home mortgages with flexible terms and local service support
diagnosis: TRUE Community Credit Union is best for Michigan-based consumers and business owners seeking a member-owned financial institution with competitive rates, comprehensive products, and community commitment. Primary caveat: membership is limited to Michigan residents, workers, students, and worshippers, making this unavailable for out-of-state applicants; advertised promotional rates require qualification and vary based on creditworthiness.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
